onboarding.welcomeDescription: A simple expense tracker to help you stay on top of your finances. Let's get you set up — it only takes a minute.
onboarding.budgetDescription: How much do you want to spend each month? You can change this later.
onboarding.categoriesDescription: Select the spending categories that apply to you. You can add more later.
onboarding.featuresDescription: Here's what you can do with Budgard.
onboarding.featureExpensesDesc: Log daily spending with categories and tags.
onboarding.featureRecurringDesc: Set up subscriptions and regular bills.
onboarding.featureAnalyticsDesc: Visualize trends and see where your money goes.
onboarding.featureReceiptsDesc: Snap photos and attach them to expenses.
onboarding.budgetSaveFailed: Could not save budget. You can set it later in settings.
onboarding.categoriesSaveFailed: Could not save categories. You can add them later.

hero.subtitle: Budgard turns spending into clarity. Track expenses, set budgets, and see exactly where your money lands — without spreadsheets, ads, or surveillance.
hero.trust: Built in the EU · No ads · No tracking · Yours to keep

install.title: Add to Home Screen
install.description: Install Budgard as an app in 4 quick steps.
install.step1: Tap the Share button at the bottom of Safari
install.step4: Tap Add in the top right corner

analytics.heading: See where your money lands.
analytics.body: Twelve months of spending in one calm chart. No filters to fuss with, no dashboards to build. Just a clean read on where things are going.

budget.heading: A budget that breathes with your month.
budget.body: Set a monthly cap. Watch your categories fill up in real time. Budgard nudges quietly when you're close — no shame, no spam.

categories.eyebrow: Made for the way you spend
categories.heading: Categories and tags that fit your life.
categories.body: Start with a sensible default set. Bend it however you like. Tag a coffee, a date night, a rent payment — find them all again in seconds.
categories.point1: Custom categories with colors and emoji
categories.point2: Tags for one-off context — vacation, gift, work

privacy.heading: Your money, your data, your business.
privacy.body: Budgard is built quietly. Your finances aren't a product we sell, and they never will be.

pillar1.title: Hosted in the EU
pillar1.body: Stored on Supabase servers in the European Union. GDPR-compliant by construction.

pillar2.title: No ads, no tracking
pillar2.body: We don't run ads. We don't share your data with brokers. We don't watch you spend.

pillar3.title: Yours to keep
pillar3.body: Export every transaction to CSV. Cancel any time. Your data stays portable.

pricing.heading: Simple plans, fair prices.
pricing.body: Start free. Upgrade when you want more. No hidden fees, no annual rituals.

free.title: Free
free.subtitle: Everything to get a real handle on your spending.
free.feature5: PWA on iOS, Android, and desktop

pro.title: Pro
pro.subtitle: For people who want the full picture.
pro.feature4: Unlimited recurring expenses & multiple tags per expense
pro.feature5: Full analytics history with year-over-year trends

q1.question: Is the free plan really free, forever?
q1.answer: Yes. The free plan gives you the core of Budgard — expenses, a monthly budget, categories, and a few recurring bills — and we have no plan to take that away. Pro is for people who want more, not a barrier to using the app.

q2.question: What's actually different on Pro?
q2.answer: Per-category budgets, savings goals, unlimited recurring expenses, multiple tags per expense, full all-time analytics with year-over-year trends, and CSV + PDF exports. The full list is in the pricing card above.

q3.question: Can I cancel anytime?
q3.answer: Yes. Cancel from settings in two taps. Your data stays — you just drop back to the free plan at the end of your billing period.

q4.question: Where is my data stored?
q4.answer: On Supabase servers in the European Union. Encrypted in transit and at rest. We don't sell, share, or analyze your transactions.

q5.question: Can I export my data?
q5.answer: Yes. CSV and PDF exports are available on Pro for your full history. Either way, your data is yours and stays portable.

q6.question: Do you have an iOS or Android app?
q6.answer: Budgard is a Progressive Web App. Add it to your Home Screen on iOS or install it on Android — it behaves like a native app, without the App Store middlemen.

finalCta.heading: Spend with intention.
finalCta.body: Start free. Add it to your Home Screen. See where your money actually goes — usually within a week.

footer.tagline: A calm expense tracker for people who'd rather think in plans than in numbers.
